title: Quotinator Changelog
description: Source of truth for all changelog content. The generation script (scripts/changelog.csx) produces CHANGELOG.md and addon/CHANGELOG.md from this file. Never edit the markdown files directly.

releases.description: Ordered list of releases, newest first.

version.description: Semver string, including optional pre-release suffix (e.g. '1.0.0-beta.1').

highlights.description: User-facing plain-English summary. Each item is one sentence. No CVE IDs, API paths, class names, or technical terms. Omit or leave empty for internal-only releases.

added.description: Technical description of new features added in this release. Developer-facing; not shown in the Blazor UI highlights.

changed.description: Technical description of changes to existing behaviour.

removed.description: Technical description of removed features or behaviour.

issues.description: GitHub issue numbers addressed by this release.

cves.description: CVE IDs addressed by this release (e.g. 'CVE-2025-6965').

translations.description: Manually curated translations of highlights keyed by ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. 'nl', 'de'). Never auto-generated. Ignored by the ha-addon format generator.

highlights.description: Translated plain-English highlights for this release in the target language.
